requirement_topic.en: Restricted Substances — No Horizontal RoHS in Thailand vs CN GB/T 26572
requirement_topic.zh: 限用物质——泰国无横向 RoHS vs 中国 GB/T 26572
requirement_topic.zht: 限用物質——泰國無橫向 RoHS vs 中國 GB/T 26572

summary.en: Thailand does not, as of 2026, have a single horizontal RoHS-type law restricting hazardous substances across all electrical and electronic equipment in the same binding way as EU RoHS or China RoHS. There is no general mandatory 'RoHS mark' requirement for LED luminaires under Thai law. Instead, restricted-substance expectations reach products indirectly: through any substance limits embedded in a specific mandatory TIS standard for the product, through hazardous-substance controls under the Hazardous Substance Act B.E. 2535 (administered across agencies including the Department of Industrial Works), and through customer/B2B contractual RoHS requirements common in export supply chains. A long-discussed Thai WEEE/RoHS-style law (a draft 'Waste from Electrical and Electronic Equipment' bill) has been under development but, as of 2026, exporters should verify whether any such law has been enacted and what substance restrictions it imposes.
summary.zh: 截至 2026 年，泰国没有像欧盟 RoHS 或中国 RoHS 那样、以同等约束力对所有电气电子设备横向限制有害物质的单一法律。泰国法律下，LED 灯具无普遍强制性“RoHS 标志”要求。限用物质要求间接触及产品：通过特定强制性 TIS 标准中嵌入的物质限值、通过《危险物质法》（B.E. 2535，由含工业工程厅在内的多机构管理）下的危险物质管控，以及通过出口供应链中常见的客户/B2B 合同 RoHS 要求。讨论已久的泰国 WEEE/RoHS 类法律（电气电子设备废弃物草案）一直在制定中，但截至 2026 年，出口商应核实此类法律是否已颁布及其施加的物质限制。
summary.zht: 截至 2026 年，泰國沒有像歐盟 RoHS 或中國 RoHS 那樣、以同等約束力對所有電氣電子設備橫向限制有害物質的單一法律。泰國法律下，LED 燈具無普遍強制性“RoHS 標誌”要求。限用物質要求間接觸及產品：通過特定強制性 TIS 標準中嵌入的物質限值、通過《危險物質法》（B.E. 2535，由含工業工程廳在內的多機構管理）下的危險物質管控，以及通過出口供應鏈中常見的客戶/B2B 合同 RoHS 要求。討論已久的泰國 WEEE/RoHS 類法律（電氣電子設備廢棄物草案）一直在制定中，但截至 2026 年，出口商應核實此類法律是否已頒布及其施加的物質限制。

standards_or_laws: No horizontal RoHS law in force in Thailand as of 2026 (verify status of any draft WEEE/RoHS-style legislation)
Hazardous Substance Act B.E. 2535 (1992) — Thailand framework for controlling hazardous substances (multi-agency)
Substance limits within specific mandatory TIS standards (where applicable) and customer/B2B contractual RoHS requirements

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 26572-2011 (Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in electrical and electronic products), covering the 6 original RoHS substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) with the same concentration thresholds as EU RoHS. China RoHS 2 (Management Measures, with SJ/T 11364-2014) requires a hazardous-substance disclosure label (orange for above threshold, green for below) on EEE sold in China. The 4 EU phthalates (DEHP, BBP, DBP, DIBP) are not in the CN mandatory restricted list under GB/T 26572 as of 2026.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 26572-2011（电子电气产品中限用物质的限量要求），涵盖原 6 项 RoHS 物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），浓度限值与欧盟 RoHS 相同。中国 RoHS 2（管理办法，配合 SJ/T 11364-2014）要求在中国销售的 EEE 上贴附有害物质披露标识（超限为橙色，低于限值为绿色）。截至 2026 年，欧盟 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）不在中国 GB/T 26572 强制限制清单内。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 26572-2011（電子電氣產品中限用物質的限量要求），涵蓋原 6 項 RoHS 物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），濃度限值與歐盟 RoHS 相同。中國 RoHS 2（管理辦法，配合 SJ/T 11364-2014）要求在中國銷售的 EEE 上貼附有害物質披露標識（超限為橙色，低於限值為綠色）。截至 2026 年，歐盟 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）不在中國 GB/T 26572 強制限制清單內。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (SAC/SAMR — covers original 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for the restricted use of hazardous substances in electronic and electrical products (China RoHS 2 disclosure label)

gap.en: The honest position is that Thailand imposes no horizontal RoHS market-access barrier comparable to China RoHS or EU RoHS, so a CN product carrying China RoHS disclosure marking faces no equivalent statutory substance bar at the Thai border as of 2026. However, the gap is the absence of a clear, fixed target: (1) substance limits may still apply through specific TIS standards or the Hazardous Substance Act, which must be checked per product; (2) Thai or international buyers frequently impose contractual RoHS (often EU-RoHS-equivalent, including the 4 phthalates) regardless of Thai law, so commercial RoHS may be stricter than CN RoHS; (3) any enacted Thai WEEE/RoHS bill could introduce new restrictions and labelling — its status must be verified at the time of export; (4) the CN orange/green disclosure label is not a Thai requirement and is not recognised. Exporters should not assume Thai market entry waives RoHS testing — they should map both Thai legal requirements and buyer contractual requirements.
gap.zh: 诚实的结论是，泰国未设置可与中国 RoHS 或欧盟 RoHS 相比的横向 RoHS 市场准入壁垒，故截至 2026 年，持有中国 RoHS 披露标记的中国产品在泰国口岸不面临等效的法定物质阻碍。然而，差距在于缺乏清晰固定的目标：（1）物质限值仍可能通过特定 TIS 标准或《危险物质法》适用，须按产品核查；（2）泰国或国际买家常不论泰国法律施加合同 RoHS（多与欧盟 RoHS 等效，含 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯），故商业 RoHS 可能严于中国 RoHS；（3）任何已颁布的泰国 WEEE/RoHS 法案可能引入新限制及标签——其状态须在出口时核实；（4）中国橙/绿披露标识非泰国要求且不被承认。出口商不应假定进入泰国市场即免除 RoHS 检测——应同时梳理泰国法律要求及买家合同要求。
gap.zht: 誠實的結論是，泰國未設置可與中國 RoHS 或歐盟 RoHS 相比的橫向 RoHS 市場准入壁壘，故截至 2026 年，持有中國 RoHS 披露標記的中國產品在泰國口岸不面臨等效的法定物質阻礙。然而，差距在於缺乏清晰固定的目標：（1）物質限值仍可能通過特定 TIS 標準或《危險物質法》適用，須按產品核查；（2）泰國或國際買家常不論泰國法律施加合同 RoHS（多與歐盟 RoHS 等效，含 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯），故商業 RoHS 可能嚴於中國 RoHS；（3）任何已頒布的泰國 WEEE/RoHS 法案可能引入新限制及標籤——其狀態須在出口時核實；（4）中國橙/綠披露標識非泰國要求且不被承認。出口商不應假定進入泰國市場即免除 RoHS 檢測——應同時梳理泰國法律要求及買家合同要求。

mandatory_status.target: No horizontal RoHS in force as of 2026 — no general mandatory restricted-substance/RoHS-mark requirement for LED luminaires under Thai law; substance limits may apply via specific TIS standards, the Hazardous Substance Act, contractual RoHS, or any future WEEE/RoHS law (verify status)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure) — China RoHS 2 hazardous-substance disclosure label required; GB/T 26572 covers 6 original substances; 4 phthalates not yet in CN mandatory list as of 2026

source.publisher: Department of Industrial Works (DIW), Ministry of Industry, Thailand — Hazardous Substance Act administration

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Thailand has no horizontal RoHS law in force as of 2026, so there is no general statutory restricted-substance bar or RoHS mark for LED luminaires — but this is not a blanket exemption. Substance limits can reach the product via specific TIS standards or the Hazardous Substance Act B.E. 2535, buyers frequently impose contractual RoHS that may exceed China RoHS (including the 4 phthalates), and a draft Thai WEEE/RoHS-style law could change the position. The Chinese orange/green disclosure label is not a Thai requirement. Verify the current legal status and map buyer requirements before assuming no RoHS obligation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至 2026 年，泰国无横向 RoHS 法律生效，故 LED 灯具无普遍法定限用物质阻碍或 RoHS 标志——但这并非全面豁免。物质限值可通过特定 TIS 标准或《危险物质法》（B.E. 2535）触及产品，买家常施加可能超出中国 RoHS（含 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯）的合同 RoHS，且泰国 WEEE/RoHS 类法律草案可能改变此局面。中国橙/绿披露标识非泰国要求。在假定无 RoHS 义务前，请核实现行法律状态并梳理买家要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至 2026 年，泰國無橫向 RoHS 法律生效，故 LED 燈具無普遍法定限用物質阻礙或 RoHS 標誌——但這並非全面豁免。物質限值可通過特定 TIS 標準或《危險物質法》（B.E. 2535）觸及產品，買家常施加可能超出中國 RoHS（含 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯）的合同 RoHS，且泰國 WEEE/RoHS 類法律草案可能改變此局面。中國橙/綠披露標識非泰國要求。在假定無 RoHS 義務前，請核實現行法律狀態並梳理買家要求。

requirement_topic.en: Hazardous Substances and WEEE / E-Waste Handling (Hazardous Substance Act; draft WEEE law)
requirement_topic.zh: 危险物质与 WEEE / 电子废弃物处理（《危险物质法》；WEEE 法律草案）
requirement_topic.zht: 危險物質與 WEEE / 電子廢棄物處理（《危險物質法》；WEEE 法律草案）

summary.en: Thailand controls hazardous substances primarily through the Hazardous Substance Act B.E. 2535 (1992), administered by several agencies (including the Department of Industrial Works and, for certain substances, other ministries), which classifies and controls listed hazardous substances in import, production, possession, and disposal. End-of-life electrical and electronic equipment (e-waste) is managed under hazardous-waste and factory/industrial-waste regulations, and Thailand has restricted imports of certain e-waste/used electronics. A dedicated WEEE-style 'Waste from Electrical and Electronic Equipment' law has been under development for several years to formalise producer responsibility and e-waste collection; its enactment status and any extended-producer-responsibility (EPR) obligations must be verified at the time of export. For LED luminaires, exporters should ensure no banned hazardous substances are present above any applicable Thai limit and that mercury (relevant to some lamp types, and to Thailand's Minamata Convention obligations) is addressed.
summary.zh: 泰国主要通过《危险物质法》（B.E. 2535，1992）管控危险物质，由多机构管理（含工业工程厅，及就某些物质的其他部委），对列管危险物质的进口、生产、持有及处置进行分类和管控。报废电气电子设备（电子废弃物）依危险废物及工厂/工业废物法规管理，泰国已限制某些电子废弃物/二手电子产品的进口。专门的 WEEE 类“电气电子设备废弃物”法律已制定数年，旨在确立生产者责任及电子废弃物回收；其颁布状态及任何延伸生产者责任（EPR）义务须在出口时核实。就 LED 灯具，出口商应确保不含超过任何适用泰国限值的禁用危险物质，并妥善处理汞（与某些灯型相关，及泰国《水俣公约》义务相关）。
summary.zht: 泰國主要通過《危險物質法》（B.E. 2535，1992）管控危險物質，由多機構管理（含工業工程廳，及就某些物質的其他部委），對列管危險物質的進口、生產、持有及處置進行分類和管控。報廢電氣電子設備（電子廢棄物）依危險廢物及工廠/工業廢物法規管理，泰國已限制某些電子廢棄物/二手電子產品的進口。專門的 WEEE 類“電氣電子設備廢棄物”法律已制定數年，旨在確立生產者責任及電子廢棄物回收；其頒布狀態及任何延伸生產者責任（EPR）義務須在出口時核實。就 LED 燈具，出口商應確保不含超過任何適用泰國限值的禁用危險物質，並妥善處理汞（與某些燈型相關，及泰國《水俁公約》義務相關）。

standards_or_laws: Hazardous Substance Act B.E. 2535 (1992) — classification and control of hazardous substances (Thailand, multi-agency)
Thai hazardous-waste / industrial-waste and e-waste import controls; draft WEEE 'Waste from Electrical and Electronic Equipment' law (verify enactment status and any EPR obligations)
Minamata Convention on Mercury obligations (relevant to mercury-containing lamp types)

summary.en: China combines GB/T 26572-2011 (substance concentration limits) and China RoHS 2 (SJ/T 11364-2014 disclosure marking) for restricted substances, and manages e-waste through the WEEE-style Regulation on the Administration of the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products (State Council Order No. 551) and the EPR-style fund mechanism. CN producers of covered EEE pay into a waste-treatment fund. These CN e-waste and substance frameworks are domestic and do not satisfy Thai hazardous-substance or any future Thai WEEE obligations.
summary.zh: 中国就限用物质结合 GB/T 26572-2011（物质浓度限值）与中国 RoHS 2（SJ/T 11364-2014 披露标记），并通过 WEEE 类《废弃电器电子产品回收处理管理条例》（国务院令第 551 号）及 EPR 式基金机制管理电子废弃物。纳管 EEE 的中国生产者须缴纳废物处理基金。上述中国电子废弃物及物质框架属国内制度，不满足泰国危险物质或任何未来泰国 WEEE 义务。
summary.zht: 中國就限用物質結合 GB/T 26572-2011（物質濃度限值）與中國 RoHS 2（SJ/T 11364-2014 披露標記），並通過 WEEE 類《廢棄電器電子產品回收處理管理條例》（國務院令第 551 號）及 EPR 式基金機制管理電子廢棄物。納管 EEE 的中國生產者須繳納廢物處理基金。上述中國電子廢棄物及物質框架屬國內制度，不滿足泰國危險物質或任何未來泰國 WEEE 義務。

standards_or_laws: Regulation on the Administration of the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products (State Council Order No. 551) — China WEEE framework
GB/T 26572-2011 + SJ/T 11364-2014 — China RoHS substance limits and disclosure marking

gap.en: China has an operating WEEE/EPR fund framework; Thailand's dedicated WEEE law remains in draft as of 2026, so the obligations differ in kind. The gaps for a Chinese exporter are: (1) Thai hazardous-substance compliance runs through the Hazardous Substance Act and product-specific limits rather than a single RoHS-style list, so substance screening must be mapped to Thai-listed substances and any applicable TIS limits; (2) mercury handling must reflect Thailand's Minamata Convention obligations for relevant lamp types; (3) Thai e-waste/used-electronics import controls may affect returns, samples, or refurbished goods; (4) if a Thai WEEE/EPR law is enacted, importers/producers may face new registration, take-back, or fee obligations — status must be verified. CN's WEEE fund participation does not transfer to Thailand. Exporters should treat Thai hazardous-substance and e-waste compliance as a separate, evolving workstream from CN RoHS/WEEE.
gap.zh: 中国已有运行中的 WEEE/EPR 基金框架；截至 2026 年，泰国专门的 WEEE 法律仍处草案阶段，故义务性质不同。对中国出口商的差距为：（1）泰国危险物质合规通过《危险物质法》及产品特定限值实现，而非单一 RoHS 式清单，故物质筛查须对应泰国列管物质及任何适用 TIS 限值；（2）汞处理须反映泰国就相关灯型的《水俣公约》义务；（3）泰国电子废弃物/二手电子产品进口管控可能影响退货、样品或翻新品；（4）若泰国 WEEE/EPR 法律颁布，进口商/生产者可能面临新的注册、回收或费用义务——状态须核实。中国 WEEE 基金参与不转移至泰国。出口商应将泰国危险物质及电子废弃物合规视为区别于中国 RoHS/WEEE 的独立且演进中的工作流。
gap.zht: 中國已有運行中的 WEEE/EPR 基金框架；截至 2026 年，泰國專門的 WEEE 法律仍處草案階段，故義務性質不同。對中國出口商的差距為：（1）泰國危險物質合規通過《危險物質法》及產品特定限值實現，而非單一 RoHS 式清單，故物質篩查須對應泰國列管物質及任何適用 TIS 限值；（2）汞處理須反映泰國就相關燈型的《水俁公約》義務；（3）泰國電子廢棄物/二手電子產品進口管控可能影響退貨、樣品或翻新品；（4）若泰國 WEEE/EPR 法律頒布，進口商/生產者可能面臨新的注冊、回收或費用義務——狀態須核實。中國 WEEE 基金參與不轉移至泰國。出口商應將泰國危險物質及電子廢棄物合規視為區別於中國 RoHS/WEEE 的獨立且演進中的工作流。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory framework, evolving — hazardous substances controlled under the Hazardous Substance Act B.E. 2535; e-waste under hazardous/industrial-waste rules; a dedicated WEEE/EPR law is in draft (verify enactment and obligations); Minamata mercury obligations apply to relevant lamp types
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China WEEE framework (State Council Order No. 551) with EPR fund; China RoHS substance limits and disclosure marking

source.publisher: Department of Industrial Works (DIW), Ministry of Industry, Thailand

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Thailand controls hazardous substances through the Hazardous Substance Act B.E. 2535 and manages e-waste through hazardous/industrial-waste rules, with a dedicated WEEE/EPR law still in draft as of 2026. Unlike China's operating WEEE fund, Thai obligations are framework- and product-specific, so exporters must screen substances against Thai-listed substances and applicable TIS limits, address mercury under Minamata obligations for relevant lamp types, and verify whether any Thai WEEE/EPR law has been enacted. China's WEEE/RoHS participation does not transfer to Thailand.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 泰国通过《危险物质法》（B.E. 2535）管控危险物质，并依危险/工业废物规则管理电子废弃物，专门的 WEEE/EPR 法律截至 2026 年仍处草案阶段。与中国运行中的 WEEE 基金不同，泰国义务属框架及产品特定性，故出口商须对照泰国列管物质及适用 TIS 限值筛查物质，就相关灯型按《水俣公约》义务处理汞，并核实泰国是否已颁布 WEEE/EPR 法律。中国 WEEE/RoHS 参与不转移至泰国。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 泰國通過《危險物質法》（B.E. 2535）管控危險物質，並依危險/工業廢物規則管理電子廢棄物，專門的 WEEE/EPR 法律截至 2026 年仍處草案階段。與中國運行中的 WEEE 基金不同，泰國義務屬框架及產品特定性，故出口商須對照泰國列管物質及適用 TIS 限值篩查物質，就相關燈型按《水俁公約》義務處理汞，並核實泰國是否已頒布 WEEE/EPR 法律。中國 WEEE/RoHS 參與不轉移至泰國。

requirement_topic.en: TIS Certification Process and Licence vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zh: TIS 认证流程与许可证 vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zht: TIS 認證流程與許可證 vs CCC / CQC

summary.en: Market access for controlled LED luminaires in Thailand runs through TISI mandatory TIS certification: (1) the product must conform to the applicable mandatory TIS standard (e.g. TIS 2780 for LED lamp safety) and be tested by a TISI-recognised laboratory; (2) a TIS licence is issued to and held by an in-country entity — a Thai-registered manufacturer or the importer — who is legally responsible for conformity; (3) the licensed product carries the TIS mark; (4) for imported goods, an import licence/permission tied to the TIS scheme is generally required before customs clearance and sale; (5) factory inspection and ongoing surveillance may apply. Unlike the EU self-declaration route, Thailand's mandatory TIS scheme is a third-party certification and licensing regime. The licence holder must be in Thailand — a foreign manufacturer cannot self-certify for the Thai market without an in-country licensee.
summary.zh: 受控 LED 灯具进入泰国市场通过 TISI 强制性 TIS 认证实现：（1）产品须符合适用强制性 TIS 标准（如 LED 灯安全的 TIS 2780），并由 TISI 认可实验室检测；（2）TIS 许可证签发给并由在地实体持有——泰国注册制造商或进口商——其对合规负法律责任；（3）持证产品加贴 TIS 标志；（4）进口货物在清关及销售前通常须取得与 TIS 方案挂钩的进口许可/许可；（5）可能适用工厂检查及持续监督。与欧盟自我声明路径不同，泰国强制性 TIS 方案是第三方认证及许可制度。许可证持有人须在泰国——外国制造商无在地持证人不能为泰国市场自我认证。
summary.zht: 受控 LED 燈具進入泰國市場通過 TISI 強制性 TIS 認證實現：（1）產品須符合適用強制性 TIS 標準（如 LED 燈安全的 TIS 2780），並由 TISI 認可實驗室檢測；（2）TIS 許可證簽發給並由在地實體持有——泰國注冊製造商或進口商——其對合規負法律責任；（3）持證產品加貼 TIS 標誌；（4）進口貨物在清關及銷售前通常須取得與 TIS 方案掛鈎的進口許可/許可；（5）可能適用工廠檢查及持續監督。與歐盟自我聲明路徑不同，泰國強制性 TIS 方案是第三方認證及許可制度。許可證持有人須在泰國——外國製造商無在地持證人不能為泰國市場自我認證。

standards_or_laws: Mandatory TIS certification and TIS mark under the Industrial Product Standards Act (TISI, Ministry of Industry)
TIS 2780 — LED lamp safety standard (example of a mandatory TIS for LED products; confirm exact number and edition)
TISI import licence/permission and factory inspection requirements for controlled products

summary.en: In China, the primary mandatory certification for luminaires in the residential market is CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA and certified by CNCA-authorized bodies (e.g. CQC — China Quality Certification Centre). CCC requires third-party certification, factory inspection, and ongoing surveillance. CQC voluntary certification covers products outside mandatory CCC. For wireless-enabled luminaires, SRRC type approval is additionally required. CCC certification and CN test reports are domestic and are not recognised by TISI for the Thai TIS licence.
summary.zh: 在中国，居民市场灯具的主要强制认证为中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由 CNCA 管理，并由 CNCA 授权机构（如中国质量认证中心 CQC）认证。CCC 要求第三方认证、工厂检查及持续监督。CQC 自愿性认证涵盖强制 CCC 范畴外的产品。对于具备无线功能的灯具，还须取得 SRRC 型号核准。CCC 认证及中国检测报告属国内制度，不被 TISI 就泰国 TIS 许可所承认。
summary.zht: 在中國，居民市場燈具的主要強制認證為中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由 CNCA 管理，並由 CNCA 授權機構（如中國質量認證中心 CQC）認證。CCC 要求第三方認證、工廠檢查及持續監督。CQC 自願性認證涵蓋強制 CCC 範疇外的產品。對於具備無線功能的燈具，還須取得 SRRC 型號核准。CCC 認證及中國檢測報告屬國內制度，不被 TISI 就泰國 TIS 許可所承認。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA/CQC)
SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China

gap.en: Both Thailand (mandatory TIS) and China (CCC) use third-party certification with factory inspection, so the model is more similar to each other than to the EU self-declaration route — but the schemes are mutually non-recognised. Key gaps: (1) a Thai TIS licence must be held by an in-country entity (Thai manufacturer or importer); a foreign manufacturer cannot self-certify — this requires appointing/relying on a Thai licensee, unlike CCC where the foreign manufacturer can be the certificate holder via a Chinese agent; (2) testing must be by a TISI-recognised laboratory; CN CNAS/CQC reports are not automatically accepted; (3) an import licence/permission tied to the TIS scheme is generally needed before customs clearance; (4) the TIS mark (not the CCC mark) must appear on product/packaging with Thai-language information; (5) for smart luminaires, NBTC approval is additionally required (see ledth-emc-02). Exporters must build the Thai certification and import pathway with a local licence holder rather than reusing the CCC file.
gap.zh: 泰国（强制性 TIS）与中国（CCC）均采用含工厂检查的第三方认证，故二者模式较欧盟自我声明路径更为相似——但两方案互不承认。主要差距：（1）泰国 TIS 许可证须由在地实体持有（泰国制造商或进口商）；外国制造商不能自我认证——须委任/依赖泰国持证人，不同于 CCC 中外国制造商可经中国代理作为证书持有人；（2）检测须由 TISI 认可实验室进行；中国 CNAS/CQC 报告不自动被接受；（3）清关前通常须取得与 TIS 方案挂钩的进口许可/许可；（4）产品/包装须加贴 TIS 标志（而非 CCC 标志）并附泰文信息；（5）就智能灯具，还须取得 NBTC 核准（见 ledth-emc-02）。出口商须与在地持证人建立泰国认证及进口路径，而非沿用 CCC 文件。
gap.zht: 泰國（強制性 TIS）與中國（CCC）均採用含工廠檢查的第三方認證，故二者模式較歐盟自我聲明路徑更為相似——但兩方案互不承認。主要差距：（1）泰國 TIS 許可證須由在地實體持有（泰國製造商或進口商）；外國製造商不能自我認證——須委任/依賴泰國持證人，不同於 CCC 中外國製造商可經中國代理作為證書持有人；（2）檢測須由 TISI 認可實驗室進行；中國 CNAS/CQC 報告不自動被接受；（3）清關前通常須取得與 TIS 方案掛鈎的進口許可/許可；（4）產品/包裝須加貼 TIS 標誌（而非 CCC 標誌）並附泰文信息；（5）就智能燈具，還須取得 NBTC 核准（見 ledth-emc-02）。出口商須與在地持證人建立泰國認證及進口路徑，而非沿用 CCC 文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — TIS certification, TIS mark, and a TIS licence held by an in-country entity required for controlled LED luminaires before import and sale; import licence/permission and factory inspection may apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for residential luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; SRRC type approval additionally required for wireless-enabled luminaires

source.publisher: TISI (Thai Industrial Standards Institute), Ministry of Industry

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Thailand's mandatory TIS certification is a third-party licensing regime, closer in model to China's CCC than to EU self-declaration, but mutually non-recognised. A TIS licence must be held by an in-country Thai manufacturer or importer, testing must be by a TISI-recognised laboratory, the TIS mark and Thai-language information must appear on the product/packaging, and an import licence may be required before customs clearance. Chinese CCC/CQC certification and reports are not accepted for the TIS licence, and smart luminaires additionally need NBTC approval. Build the Thai certification and import pathway with a local licence holder.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 泰国强制性 TIS 认证是第三方许可制度，模式上较欧盟自我声明更接近中国 CCC，但互不承认。TIS 许可证须由在地泰国制造商或进口商持有，检测须由 TISI 认可实验室进行，产品/包装须加贴 TIS 标志及泰文信息，清关前可能须取得进口许可。中国 CCC/CQC 认证及报告不被 TIS 许可所接受，智能灯具还须取得 NBTC 核准。请与在地持证人建立泰国认证及进口路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 泰國強制性 TIS 認證是第三方許可制度，模式上較歐盟自我聲明更接近中國 CCC，但互不承認。TIS 許可證須由在地泰國製造商或進口商持有，檢測須由 TISI 認可實驗室進行，產品/包裝須加貼 TIS 標誌及泰文信息，清關前可能須取得進口許可。中國 CCC/CQC 認證及報告不被 TIS 許可所接受，智能燈具還須取得 NBTC 核准。請與在地持證人建立泰國認證及進口路徑。
